resources.string: Swap left app with right app, keep current split
Swap top app with bottom app, keep current split
Battery %d percent. Battery saver is on.
Battery %d percent, charging paused for battery protection.
Battery %1$d percent, %2$s, charging paused for battery protection.

"You can now make the screen extra dim by lowering the brightness level even further.
Since this feature is now part of the brightness slider, extra dim shortcuts are being removed."
Extra dim is now part of the brightness slider
Lock screen, double tap and hold to customize lock screen.
Tap to open Wallpaper Carousel settings
Move button to the edge to hide it temporarily

"Tap to open accessibility features. Customize or replace this button in Settings.
"View settings
{count, plural, =1 {# shortcut removed} other {# shortcuts removed} }
^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 is the keyboard shortcut to use color inversion. Color inversion turns light screens dark. It also turns dark screens light.
^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 is the keyboard shortcut to use ^4. ^5

^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 is the keyboard shortcut to use ^4, an accessibility feature. This allows you to quickly zoom in on the screen to make content larger. Once magnification is on, press ^1 icon + ^2 and \"+\" or \"-\" to adjust zoom.

^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 is the keyboard shortcut to use ^4. ^4 is a screen reader that allows you to hear items spoken aloud. It can be helpful for people who have difficulty seeing the screen. This may change how your device works.
By turning on the keyboard shortcut, you will allow TalkBack to have full control of your device.
Full control is appropriate for apps that help you with accessibility needs, but not for most apps.
It can track your interactions with an app or a hardware sensor, and interact with apps on your behalf.
It can read all content on the screen and display content over other apps.
^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 is the keyboard shortcut to use ^4. This allows you to customize font and spacing and hear text read aloud right on your device.
Pressing ^1 icon + ^2 + ^3 turns on ^4, an accessibility feature. This lets you control your device hands-free.
This feature will open next time you select the accessibility button
Screen is locked in landscape orientation.
Screen is locked in portrait orientation.
You can press the accessibility key to start using accessibility features.
To activate this feature, insert your SIM card.
Failed to create a new guest
Your device has entered Safe mode due to system interface issues, causing some features to become unavailable. Submit your feedback to speed up the resolution of this problem.
Press the action key at any time. Tap to learn more gestures.
Use your keyboard to view all apps
To view all your apps, press the action key on your keyboard
Mobile data won’t automatically switch based on availability
Turn on when battery is likely to run out
Swipe left or right using three fingers. Tap to learn more gestures.
Use your touchpad to go back
To go back, swipe left or right with three fingers on the touchpad
"Links can't be added from other profiles"
You have %s battery left. Battery Saver turns on dark theme, restricts background activity, and delays notifications.
Battery Saver turns on dark theme, restricts background activity, and delays notifications.
"Too many incorrect attempts. Try again in %d seconds."
Identity Check is on and can verify you only by your fingerprint or face. %1$s
If you enter an incorrect password on the next attempt, this device’s data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect password on the next attempt, your work profile and its data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect password on the next attempt, this user will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect pattern on the next attempt, this device’s data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect pattern on the next attempt, your work profile and its data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect pattern on the next attempt, this user will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect PIN on the next attempt, this device’s data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect PIN on the next attempt, your work profile and its data will be deleted.
If you enter an incorrect PIN on the next attempt, this user will be deleted.
Password is required to recover biometrics after too many failed attempts
Pattern is required to recover biometrics after too many failed attempts
PIN is required to recover biometrics after too many failed attempts
Unlocked by face. Press to continue.
Unlocked by face. Tap to continue.
This is required to improve security and performance
Connected | Battery %1$s | In use (calls and media)
"Couldn't pair with %1$s because of an incorrect PIN or passkey."
Tap here to manage which apps and conversations can bubble
New conversations appear as icons in a bottom corner of your screen. Tap to expand them or drag to dismiss them.
Recent bubbles and dismissed bubbles will appear here
New conversations appear as floating icons, or bubbles. Tap to open bubble. Drag to move it.
Tap Manage to turn off bubbles from this app
Your organization only allows you to make calls from work apps
"You're currently casting your entire screen to a nearby device"
"You're currently casting your entire screen to %1$s"
"You're currently casting to a nearby device"
"You're currently casting %1$s to a nearby device"
"Anyone can view widgets on your lock screen, even if your device's locked."

To open an app using a widget, you’ll need to verify it’s you. Also, keep in mind that anyone can view them, even when your device’s locked. Some widgets may not have been intended for your lock screen and may be unsafe to add here.
Your inner display will be mirrored. Your front display will be turned off.
Couldn’t access %1$s. Check the %2$s app to make sure the control is still available and that the app settings haven’t changed.
Controls could not be loaded. Check the %s app to make sure that the app settings haven’t changed.
Choose device controls to access quickly
The current media session cannot be hidden.
{count, plural, =1 {# control added.} other {# controls added.} }
%s can choose which controls and content show here.

"You can add controls for your external devices to the lock screen.
Your device app may allow you to control some devices without unlocking your phone or tablet.
You can make changes any time in Settings."
Show and control devices from lock screen?
You can control some devices without unlocking your phone or tablet. Your device app determines which devices can be controlled in this way.
Headphone volume has been high for longer than recommended
Add, remove, and reorder your widgets in this space

"If you turn off system optimization and turn on Battery saver, Dark mode will be turned on automatically. To turn off Dark mode, turn off Battery saver, or turn on system optimization in Settings > Developer options > Turn on system optimization."

"The data limit you set has been reached. You are no longer using mobile data.
If you resume, charges may apply for data usage."
%1$s will no longer show Live Updates. You can change this any time in Settings.
Quickly open apps in your browser here
"Can't unlock this device with fingerprints or face data when you're using a third party screen lock"
"Can't unlock this device with face data when you're using a third party screen lock"
"Can't unlock this device with fingerprints when you're using a third party screen lock"
If you forgot your PUK code, you can disable this eSIM not to lose access to your device. After that, you can contact your carrier to get help.
Allow any widget on lock screen?
"Note: After a reboot, this app can't start until you unlock your phone"
This device belongs to your organization
This app can only be opened in 1 window
App does not support split screen
Double tap to download Wallpaper Carousel
This notification does not support dragging to split screen
Press and hold to add or rearrange items
Show a clock, photos, or weather when your phone is charging
The name and picture you choose will be visible to anyone who uses this device.
To connect your keyboard with your tablet, you first have to turn on Bluetooth.
The eSIM can’t be disabled due to an error.

"To set up Face Unlock again, your current face model will be deleted.
You’ll need to set up this feature again to use your face to unlock your phone."
Couldn’t set up face unlock. Go to Settings to try again.
Hold the device in front of your face
Tap above to use Face unlock
Open your eyes a bit wider
Enter password or use fingerprint to unlock
Draw pattern or use fingerprint to unlock
Enter PIN or use fingerprint to unlock
"Too many incorrect attempts. This device's data will be deleted."
Too many incorrect attempts. This work profile and its data will be deleted.
Too many incorrect attempts. This user will be deleted.
{count, plural, =1 {# app is active} other {# apps are active} }
You can locate this phone with Find My Device even when powered off
"Can't use fingerprint scanner in one-handed mode. Exit one-handed mode and try again."
Your fingerprint is active now. Use it to unlock the device, or enter password.
"Your fingerprint is active now. Use it to unlock the device, or enter your password."
"Your fingerprint is active now. Use it to unlock the device, or draw your pattern."
"Your fingerprint is active now. Use it to unlock the device, or enter your PIN."
Too many unsuccessful attempts. Enter your screen lock now or try using the fingerprint in a few seconds.
"Too many unsuccessful attempts. Enter your password to unlock."
"Too many unsuccessful attempts. Draw your pattern to unlock."
"Too many unsuccessful attempts. Enter your PIN to unlock."

"To set up Fingerprint Unlock again, your current fingerprint images and models will be deleted.
After they’re deleted, you’ll need to set up Fingerprint Unlock again to use your fingerprint to unlock your phone or verify it’s you."

"To set up Fingerprint Unlock again, your current fingerprint images and model will be deleted.
After they’re deleted, you’ll need to set up Fingerprint Unlock again to use your fingerprint to unlock your phone or verify it’s you."
Couldn’t set up fingerprint unlock. Go to Settings to try again.
"Flip to turn on flashlight. Turn off with the Power button."
Date according to the traditional Chinese calendar: %s
%1$s %2$s, date according to the traditional Chinese calendar: %3$s, holiday: %4$s
%1$s %2$s, %3$s, date according to the traditional Chinese calendar: %4$s
Holiday: %1$s, date according to the traditional Chinese calendar: %2$s
Always-on display theme has been set to custom due to doodles
Always-on display theme has been set to custom due to Super wallpapers
Always-on display theme has been set to custom due to third party themes
Always-on display theme has been set to custom due to third party wallpapers
Always-on display style switched to Custom
This will delete apps and data from the current guest session
You can save activity from the current session or delete all apps and data
All activity will be deleted on exit
You can save or delete your activity on exit
Reset to delete session activity now, or you can save or delete activity on exit
This will start a new guest session and delete all apps and data from the current session
Say the name of the app you want to open
Say the name of the feature you want to use
"Don't lift your finger. Swipe to select."
Expand to left and right separated controls
Your device is getting warm near the charging port. If it’s connected to a charger or USB accessory, unplug it, and take care as the cable may also be warm.

"Your phone will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your phone, but it may run slower.
Once your phone has cooled down, it will run normally."
"Some features limited while phone cools down. Tap for more info"
Quickly access your home controls as a screensaver
Swipe up using three fingers. Tap to learn more gestures.
Use your touchpad to go home
To go home, swipe up with three fingers on the touchpad
• At least one device or device panel are available
To add the Home app as a shortcut, make sure the app is installed
Access your favorite widgets and screen savers while charging.
App icon for a widget being installed
This input method may be able to collect all the text you type, including personal data like passwords and credit card numbers. It comes from the app %1$s. Use this input method?
Input methods may be able to collect all the text you type, including personal data like password and credit card numbers. Use %1$s?
The device will soon turn off; press to keep it on.
Open a floating window and wait for download to finish
Open a floating window and wait to be matched
Open a floating window and wait for respawn
Entering your password is required when the device reboots
"Can't switch between spaces during a call"
"Can't switch between spaces in Workstation mode"
"Can't use Second space in Hibernation mode"
"Can't use Second space due to low battery"
"Can't switch between spaces when parental controls are on"
"Can't switch between spaces when Ultra battery saver is on"
You need to enter First space after the device was rebooted
Drawing your pattern is required when the device reboots
Enter your password at least once every %d hours to keep this device secure
Confirm your screen lock to continue
Entering your PIN is required when the device reboots
Confirm Second space password to continue
App opened without being installed. Tap to learn more.
Use the charger that came with your device
"Can't edit Lock screen when Ultra battery saver is on"
Unlocked by face. Press confirm to continue.
%s • Charging on hold to protect battery
Password is required after too many attempts
Pattern is required after too many attempts
PIN is required after too many attempts
Can’t unlock with face. Too many attempts.
To use Face Unlock, turn on camera access in Settings
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, the work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this user will be removed, which will delete all user data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this phone will be reset, which will delete all its data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. The work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This user will be removed, which will delete all user data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This phone will be reset, which will delete all its data.
Type a PIN that is 4 to 8 numbers.
PUK code should be 8 numbers or more.
{count, plural, =1 {Enter SIM PIN. You have # remaining attempt before you must contact your carrier to unlock your device.} other {Enter SIM PIN. You have # remaining attempts.} }

{count, plural, =1 {SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. You have # remaining attempt before SIM becomes permanently unusable. Contact carrier for details.} other {SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. You have # remaining attempts before SIM becomes permanently unusable. Contact carrier for details.} }
{count, plural, =1 {Incorrect SIM PIN code, you have # remaining attempt before you must contact your carrier to unlock your device.} other {Incorrect SIM PIN code, you have # remaining attempts. } }
Incorrect SIM PIN code you must now contact your carrier to unlock your device.

{count, plural, =1 {Incorrect SIM PUK code, you have # remaining attempt before SIM becomes permanently unusable.} other {Incorrect SIM PUK code, you have # remaining attempts before SIM becomes permanently unusable.} }
SIM is unusable. Contact your carrier.
Already tried that password. Try another.
Already tried that pattern. Try another.
Already tried that PIN. Try another.
Screen locked. Too many authentication attempts.
For added security, device was locked by work policy
Device updated. Enter password to continue.
Device updated. Draw pattern to continue.
Device updated. Enter PIN to continue.
Added security required. Device wasn’t unlocked for a while.
Added security required. Password not used for a while.
Added security required. Pattern not used for a while.
Added security required. PIN not used for a while.
Password is required after device restarts
Pattern is required after device restarts
PIN is required after device restarts
Password is required to sign in
Pattern is required to sign in
PIN is required to sign in
For additional security, use password instead
For additional security, use pattern instead
For additional security, use PIN instead
SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. Contact carrier for details.
SIM \"%1$s\" is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. Contact carrier for details.
%1$s Disable eSIM to use device without mobile service.
Double-tap outside an app to reposition it
Drag in another app for split screen
You can restart the app so it looks better on your screen, but you may lose your progress or any unsaved changes
"When turned off, ongoing notifications from this app won't be promoted on your lock screen and status bar"

"Device logs record what happens on your device. Apps can use these logs to find and fix issues.
Some logs may contain sensitive info, so only allow apps you trust to access all device logs.
If you don’t allow this app to access all device logs, it can still access its own logs. Your device manufacturer may still be able to access some logs or info on your device."
Allow %s to access all device logs?
To play here, move closer to %1$s
To see more devices, you may need to allow permissions for %1$s
Wake up device to play here
When you’re sharing your entire screen, anything on your screen is visible to %s. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
When you’re sharing an app, anything shown or played in that app is visible to %s. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
When you’re casting your entire screen, anything on your screen is visible. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
When you’re casting an app, anything shown or played in that app is visible. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
Group custom notifications from \"%1$s\" in \"More notifications\"?
Show custom notifications from \"%1$s\" in the Notification shade?
"You're about to turn off Notification spotlight for %1$s. These notifications will be displayed normally. Turn off now?"
This will stop all live updates from %1$s. New notifications will be displayed in the regular format. Stop live updates now?
Locked screen orientation in landscape mode
Locked screen orientation in portrait mode
"Upcoming notifications will be hidden for %d minute. "
"Upcoming notifications will be hidden until the device is locked. "
Go to Settings for more options
Applied successfully. Go to Settings for more options.
You won’t have access to data or the internet through %s. Internet will only be available via Wi-Fi.
Using mobile data may incur charges based on your mobile service plan.
A certificate authority is installed on this device. Your secure network traffic may be monitored or modified.
This device is connected to the internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin.
Your organization installed a certificate authority in your work profile. Your secure network traffic may be monitored or modified.
Your work apps are connected to the internet through %1$s. Your network activity in work apps, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin and VPN provider.
Your admin has turned on network logging, which monitors traffic in your work profile but not in your personal profile.

"This device belongs to your organization.
Your IT admin can monitor and manage settings, corporate access, apps, data associated with your device, and your device's location information.
For more information, contact your IT admin."
Your organization installed a certificate authority on this device. Your secure network traffic may be monitored or modified.
Your admin has turned on network logging, which monitors traffic on your device.

"This device belongs to %1$s.
Your IT admin can monitor and manage settings, corporate access, apps, data associated with your device, and your device's location information.
For more information, contact your IT admin."
This device is connected to the internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to the VPN provider.
Some controls can only be changed by your parent
Your personal apps are connected to the internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your VPN provider.
This device is connected to the internet through %1$s and %2$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin.

"%1$s may be able to access data associated with this device, manage apps, and change this device’s settings.
If you have questions, contact %2$s."
Make sure your device and the Cast device are on the same Wi-Fi network.
Unable to find devices, make sure your device and the Cast device are on the same Wi-Fi network and try again.
Your recent conversations will show up here
No, don’t make them an admin
Select a default notes app to use the notetaking shortcut
Have the system determine if this notification should make sound or vibration
Synced notification priority and settings can be adjusted on your %1$s
May ring or vibrate based on device settings
May ring or vibrate based on device settings. Conversations from %1$s bubble by default.
Shows at the top of conversation notifications and as a profile picture on lock screen, appears as a bubble, interrupts Do Not Disturb
Shows at the top of conversation notifications and as a profile picture on lock screen
Shows at the top of conversation notifications and as a profile picture on lock screen, appears as a bubble
Shows at the top of conversation notifications and as a profile picture on lock screen, interrupts Do Not Disturb
No sound or vibration but still appears in the conversation section
{count, plural, =1 {# more notification inside.} other {# more notifications inside.} }
This group of notifications cannot be configured here
Notification organizer bundles and silences lower priority notifications. Add more categories in Settings.
Your longer conversations can now be summarized to give you quick recaps
Notifications are blocked from interrupting and appearing in the shade.
Notifications can interrupt all modes, including Do Not Disturb.
Highlighted notifications show at the top of the notification shade.
Silenced notifications show at the bottom of the shade and do not ring or vibrate.
The rule could not be saved. Please try again.
"Be sure to follow the troubleshooting tips provided in the notice before exiting Safe mode. If you don't, your device might enter Safe mode again."
Cleared system interface and Themes data successfully. You can use your device normally.
Your device is in Safe mode now. Tap to view how you can restore system interface.
Notice on fixing the issue of system interface crashes
To exit, swipe up from the bottom of the screen or tap anywhere above the app
Choose how to open web links for this app
How do you want to open %1$s links?
Swipe up and hold using three fingers. Tap to learn more gestures.
Use your touchpad to view recent apps
To view recent apps, swipe up and hold with three fingers on the touchpad
See recent messages, missed calls, and status updates

string.name: phone_locked_foget_password_method_content
string.Data: You have to <font color=#a5220e>erase all data </font>on your device, including photos and contacts, and then set a new Lock screen password.

string.name: phone_locked_forget_password_suggesstion_one_content
string.Data: Power off your device, press and hold the <font color=#a5220e>Power button</font> and the <font color=#a5220e>Volume up button</font> simultaneously until you see the Mi logo.

string.name: phone_locked_forget_password_suggesstion_two_content
string.Data: Select <font color=#a5220e>\"Wipe & Reset\"</font> and wait until the device reboots.

resources.string: Slide up from the bottom of the screen and pause to unpin this app
Press and hold the back and preview buttons to unpin this app
Private DNS server cannot be accessed
Exit Second space and try again
"Couldn't connect to mobile data network. Wait a minute or two and try again."
All Quick Settings tiles will reset to the device’s original settings
"Certain display settings aren't compatible with Dark mode. However, they will be restored once you turn Dark mode off."
What part of your device experience was affected?
%1$s wants to add a tile to Quick Settings. Select a tile size to continue.
"This device's music and videos will play on both pairs of headphones"
All Bluetooth devices will stay disconnected today
Tap to connect or disconnect a device
"If you turn off mobile data, you won't be able to use the internet unless you connect to Wi-Fi. You'll still be able to send MMS. Turn off mobile data anyway?"
Using mobile data may generate additional charges depending on your payment plan. Allow using mobile data anyway?
Your organization may monitor network traffic in your work profile
Your work apps are connected to the internet through %1$s
Work profile network activity is visible to your IT admin
This device belongs to your organization
Your organization owns this device and may monitor network traffic
This device belongs to your organization and is connected to the internet through %1$s
This device belongs to your organization and is connected to the internet through VPNs
%1$s may monitor network traffic in your work profile
%1$s owns this device and may monitor network traffic
This device belongs to %1$s and is connected to the internet through %2$s
This device belongs to %1$s and is connected to the internet through VPNs
This device is connected to the internet through %1$s
This device is managed by your parent
Your personal apps are connected to the internet through %1$s
This device is connected to the internet through VPNs
Use mobile data of the secondary SIM to boost connection speed
Inner screen orientation locked in landscape mode
Inner screen orientation locked in portrait mode
Dual band Wi-Fi speed boost needs to use two different Wi-Fi bands. If you connect to a different main network, auxiliary connection will be lost.
For higher resolution, use the rear camera
For higher resolution, flip the phone
Remove System UI Tuner from Settings and stop using all of its features?
Tap to restart this app for a better view
Tap for details on battery and data usage
Screen capture is blocked by your IT admin
Open screen recording in file manager
Open screen recording in viewing app
Bottom-left handle - Use arrow keys to resize
Bottom-right handle - Use arrow keys to resize
Top-left handle - Use arrow keys to resize
Top-right handle - Use arrow keys to resize
Screen capturing is disabled by device policy
"You won't be able to leave this app until you unpin it by sliding up from the bottom of the screen and pausing."
"You won't be able to leave this app until you unpin it by pressing and holding the back and preview buttons."
Slide up from the bottom of the screen and pause to unpin this app
Press and hold the back and preview buttons to unpin this app
To cancel pinning this app, please long press the Tasks button
To unpin this app, touch & hold Back and Home buttons
Deleting this recording will permanently delete the video file from your device.
Pinch, drag, and tap selfie to adjust
Single app (Open an app to choose)
Choose what to share. Select tab, app, or entire screen. Then press share.
Sharing app. Navigate to check available apps.
App sharing button. Not selected. Press enter to share app.
Close button. Press enter to close pre-share dialog.
Sharing fullscreen. Navigate to check available displays.
Fullscreen button. Not selected. Press enter to share fullscreen.
%1$s selected. Navigate to share button to start sharing.
%1$s. Not selected. Press enter to select.
Share button. Off. Select app, tab, or display to share.
Sharing on. %1$s selected. Press enter to start sharing.
Now sharing app: %1$s. Use privacy indicator to end sharing.
Now sharing display: %1$s. Use privacy indicator to end sharing.
Now sharing tab: %1$s. Use privacy indicator to end sharing.
Stopped sharing app: %1$s. Screen not shared with anyone.
Stopped sharing display: %1$s. Screen not shared with anyone.
Stopped sharing tab: %1$s. Screen not shared with anyone.
Sharing tab. Navigate to check available tabs.
Tab sharing button. Not selected. Press enter to share tab.
Screen sharing initiation ended. Screen not shared with anyone.
When you’re sharing an app, anything shown or played in that app is visible to %1$s. So be careful with sensitive information.
When you’re sharing your entire screen, anything on your screen is visible to %1$s. So be careful with sensitive information.
When you’re sharing a tab, anything within the tab is visible to %1$s. So be careful with sensitive information.
Ongoing notification for a screen record session
Sound from your device, like music, calls, and ringtones
When you’re recording your entire screen, anything shown on your screen is recorded. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
When you’re recording an app, anything shown or played in that app is recorded. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, and audio and video.
Taking screenshots is blocked by your IT admin
"Something went wrong. Can't save to \"%1$s\" folder."
%1$s and other open apps detected this screenshot.
"Taking screenshots isn't allowed by the app or your organization"
Device must be unlocked before screenshot can be saved
Saved in %1$s in the private profile
Saved in %1$s in the work profile
The fingerprint sensor is on the power button. It’s the flat button next to the raised volume button on the edge of the phone.
Tap a conversation to add it to your Home screen
Select tiles to rearrange and resize
This unblocks access for all apps and services allowed to use your camera.
This unblocks access for all apps and services allowed to use your camera or microphone.
This unblocks access for all apps and services allowed to use your microphone.
Set default notes app in Settings
Screen sharing is on. Use privacy indicator to end sharing.
"You're currently sharing your entire screen with an app"
"You're currently sharing your entire screen with %1$s"
To create this shortcut, press the Action key and one or more other keys together
This will delete your custom shortcut permanently.
This will delete all your custom shortcuts permanently.
Key combination already in use. Try another combination.
10 app custom shortcut limit has been used up
Delete a shortcut to be able to add a new one

string.name: shut_down_password_forget_password_suggesstion_one_content
string.Data: Press and hold the [Power] and [Volume +] buttons until you see .

string.name: shut_down_password_forget_password_suggesstion_two_content
string.Data: Select <font color=#e6e6e6>[Wipe data]</font> and tap <font color=#e6e6e6>[Reboot]</font> after that.

resources.string: SIM card is locked. Replace it or enter password to unlock.
"You've entered an incorrect PUK code at least %d times. Your SIM card is invalid now. Replace this SIM card with another one."
Allow %1$s to show slices from any app
{count, plural, =1 {# hour} =2 {# hours} few {# hours} other {# hours} }
{count, plural, =1 {# minute} few {# minutes} other {# minutes} }
The alarm will go off at %1$s
Connect your stylus to a charger
Use split screen with app on the left
Use split screen with app on the right
"Your device is overheated. Can't use this feature now."

"Your phone was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your phone is now running normally.
Your phone may get too hot if you: \u0009• Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video, or navigation apps) \u0009• Download or upload large files \u0009• Use your phone in high temperatures"
"Your phone is now running normally. Tap for more info"
Phone turned off due to heat

[ { \"clockInfo\": { \"blendColor\": -5526613, \"blendColor180\": -5526613, \"needInverseColor\": false, \"primaryColor\": -1, \"primaryColor180\": -1, \"style\": 0, \"templateId\": \"classic\", \"wallpaperDark\": true, \"wallpaperDark180\": true }, \"otherInfoColors\": { \"cameraBlockAreaWallpaperDark\": true, \"cameraIconBgColor\": -1, \"cameraIconBgColor180\": -1, \"cameraIconColor\": -16777216, \"cameraIconColor180\": -16777216, \"isCameraIconBgBlur\": true, \"isDeepCameraWallpaper\": true, \"isDeepCameraWallpaper180\": true, \"isDeepFaceWallpaper0\": true, "You won't receive notifications about app behavior during this session"
Get quick access to your favorite app widgets without unlocking your device.
"Your device is overheated. Can't use flashlight now."
"Can't use flashlight due to low battery"
Press the action key on your keyboard to view all of your apps
To go back using your touchpad, swipe left or right using three fingers
Swipe left or right using three fingers on your touchpad
You completed the go back gesture.
Swipe up with three fingers on your touchpad to go to your home screen
Swipe up with three fingers on your touchpad
Next, swipe up with three fingers again to go to your home screen
You completed the go home gesture
You completed the view recent apps gesture
Swipe up with three fingers on your touchpad
Swipe up with three fingers on your touchpad to go to your recent apps screen
Swipe right using four fingers on your touchpad
You completed the switch apps gesture.
Swipe right using four fingers on your touchpad to switch apps
These experimental features may change, break, or disappear in future releases. Proceed with caution.
System UI Tuner gives you extra ways to tweak and customize the Android user interface. These experimental features may change, break, or disappear in future releases. Proceed with caution.
Fun for some but not for all
Features like Quick Share and Find My Device use Bluetooth
Bluetooth will turn on tomorrow morning
Press the action key on your keyboard
You completed the view all apps gesture
Tutorial animation, click to pause and resume play.
No installed apps work with this USB accessory. Learn more about this accessory at %1$s
Using %1$s with this device might prevent hearing calls, notifications and alarms.
This app has not been granted record permission but could capture audio through this USB device. Using %1$s with this device might prevent hearing calls, notifications and alarms.
The following device was connected to your %1$s:
The following devices were connected to your %1$s:
The following devices were connected to your %1$s. These devices will only be trusted after you sign in.
The following device was connected to your %1$s. This device will only be trusted after you sign in.

"To protect your device from liquid or debris, the USB port is disabled and won’t detect any accessories.
You’ll be notified when it’s okay to use the USB port again."
"The user currently signed in to this device can't turn on USB debugging. To use this feature, switch to an admin user."
USB port enabled to detect chargers and accessories

"
Adding a new user will exit guest mode and delete all apps and data from the current guest session."

"You can share this device with other people by creating additional users. Each user has their own space, which they can customize with apps, wallpaper, and so on. Users can also adjust device settings like Wi‑Fi that affect everyone.
When you add a new user, that person needs to set up their space.
Any user can update apps for all other users. Accessibility settings and services may not transfer to the new user."

"When you add a new user, that person needs to set up their space.
Any user can update apps for all other users."
"Change this app's aspect ratio in Settings"

Admins have special privileges that other users don’t. An admin can manage all users, update or reset this device, modify settings, see all installed apps, and grant or revoke admin privileges for others.
Get set up to make faster, more secure purchases with your phone
There was a problem getting your cards, please try again later
To add the Wallet app as a shortcut, make sure at least one card has been added
To add the Wallet app as a shortcut, make sure the app is installed
The user currently signed in to this device can’t turn on wireless debugging. To use this feature, switch to an admin user.
Allow wireless debugging on this network?
To improve device experience, apps and services can still scan for Wi‑Fi networks at any time, even when Wi‑Fi is off. You can change this in Wi‑Fi scanning settings. Change

Check computer settings and try again.} WATCH {Can't connect. Check watch settings and try again.} VEHICLE {Can't connect. Check vehicle settings and try again.} other {Can't connect. Check device settings and try again.} }"

{DEVICE_TYPE, select, PHONE {{NETWORK_NAME} from your phone} TABLET {{NETWORK_NAME} from your tablet} COMPUTER {{NETWORK_NAME} from your computer} WATCH {{NETWORK_NAME} from your watch} VEHICLE {{NETWORK_NAME} from your vehicle} other {{NETWORK_NAME} from your device} }
Couldn’t complete sign-up. Tap to try again.
Private DNS server cannot be accessed
Tap to renew subscription and connect
Network is over capacity. Try again later.
Weak signal. Try moving closer to the router.
Place your device on the center of the charging base
Charging is slow. Adjust your device.
"You won't hear your next alarm %1$s unless you turn this off before then"
Notifications and calls will be silenced
Notifications and calls will be silenced when device is locked
